from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class TlsConfig:
    use_tls: bool
    cert_path: str
    key_path: str

@dataclass
class DatabaseConfig:
    host: str
    port: int
    user: str
    password: str

class ServerConfiguration:
    # Correct: group related fields into composite sub-objects to maintain cohesion and readability
    def __init__(self, tls: TlsConfig, db: DatabaseConfig):
        self.host = "localhost"
        self.port = 8080
        self.tls = tls
        self.db = db
        self.timeout = 30
        self.retries = 3
